description: Designed for everyday use, this messenger bag from wrangler is perfect for carrying all your stuff in style. With ample space to stash away daily belongings, it makes for a perfect bag to college as well as work.Made of canvas with complete protective nylon lining for easy cleaning and durabilityButton holders and straps made of synthetic leatherOne fabric compartment with buttoned flap One main zippered compartmentMain flap attached to the body with velcro strapsWide adjustable strap to customise lengthCareDo not washDo not dry-cleanUse mild brush to remove dust if necessary
